lessons.title: The CIA Triad: Deep Dive
lessons.description: Beyond the definitions – real-world trade-offs, non-repudiation, and how to measure security.

lessons.title: Threats, Vulnerabilities, and Risk
lessons.description: Understand the difference, calculate risk, and learn common vulnerability types.

lessons.title: AAA: Authentication, Authorization, Accounting
lessons.description: The framework for controlling who accesses what and tracking their actions.

lessons.title: Introduction to Cryptography
lessons.description: Encryption, hashing, and digital signatures – the math that protects data in transit and at rest.

lessons.title: Defense in Depth and Security Policies
lessons.description: Layered security strategies, the principle of least privilege, and building a security culture.
